description:
---

### [choco://intel-xtu](choco://intel-xtu)
To use choco:// protocol URLs, install [(unofficial) choco:// Protocol support ](https://chocolatey.org/packages/choco-protocol-support)

---


![Screenshot of Intel XTU](https://cdn.staticaly.com/gh/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/master/intel-xtu/intel-xtu_screenshot.png)	

### Purpose

Intel XTU is a Windows*-based performance-tuning software that enables novice and experienced enthusiasts to overclock, monitor, and stress a system. The software interface exposes a set of robust capabilities common in most enthusiast platforms along with new features available on new Intel® application processors and Intel® motherboards.

See the release notes for installation instructions, supported hardware, what is new, bug fixes, and known issues. Intel XTU may or may not work on unsupported processors.

**[PACKAGE NOTES](https://github.com/bcurran3/ChocolateyPackages/blob/master/intel-xtu/readme.md)**

---

**Click here to [Patreon-ize](https://www.patreon.com/bcurran3) the package maintainer.**

summary: The Intel® Extreme Tuning Utility (Intel® XTU) is used to overclock, monitor, and stress a system.
author: Intel Corporation
